files.purpose: Windows runtime executable for offline RIFE inference
OpenMP runtime required by the packaged RIFE executable

Selected launch graph definition for the RIFE v4.6 model

licenseDownloads.purpose: MIT license for the packaged RIFE runtime

removedCategories: Unselected RIFE model directories: rife, rife-anime, rife-HD, rife-UHD, rife-v2, rife-v2.3, rife-v2.4, rife-v3.0, rife-v3.1 and rife-v4
Upstream README copies and archive staging files
Any temporary extraction directories and downloaded archives
notes: R6 keeps only rife-v4.6 so R7 can wire a single canonical interpolation model path without inheriting all historical variants.
Future runtime assembly should treat Rife/Models/rife-v4.6 and Rife/Configs/rife-v4.6 as the selected launch asset pair.

licenseDownloads.purpose: MIT license for the packaged Real-ESRGAN NCNN runtime
BSD-3-Clause license for the selected Real-ESRGAN model family

removedCategories: Sample inputs and demo media: input.jpg, input2.jpg and onepiece_demo.mp4
Unused model assets: realesr-animevideov3-x3 and realesrgan-x4plus-anime
Upstream README copies and archive staging files
notes: The packaged archive is sourced from the official Real-ESRGAN release because it contains the NCNN runtime plus the launch model payloads we need.
R6 intentionally keeps Standard x4 and Anime x2/x4 native variants to match the launch planning assumptions for later R9 chaining logic.
